text: Take the detector. It helps you find anomalous nests with artifacts.
translation: Take the detector. It helps you find anomalous nests with artifacts.

text: Take the tablet. It has a map, a list of active missions and a flashlight, which is turned on by the yellow button on top.
translation: Take the tablet. It has a map, a list of active missions and a flashlight, which is turned on by the yellow button on top.

translation: The Backpack and Vest have an internal capacity, it is shown on the blue indicator on the item.

text: The Tide is not coming yet, don't worry. If the sound is getting on your nerves, feel free to press the button to turn the Tidemeter off.
translation: The Tide is not coming yet, don't worry. If the sound is getting on your nerves, feel free to press the button to turn the Tidemeter off.

text: The backpack can be released anywhere and will hang in the air.
translation: The backpack can be released anywhere and will hang in the air.

text: The easy level is a great start for beginners. Master the game with a gentle introduction and less strict conditions. As you gain experience, it's easy to increase the difficulty and take on bigger challenges.
translation: The easy level is a great start for beginners. Master the game with a gentle introduction and less strict conditions. As you gain experience, it's easy to increase the difficulty and take on bigger challenges.

translation: The items for the mission have been lost. Pick them up.

translation: The more items a character carries, the slower he is. Hold #BUTTON on the non-main hand to open the character info window.

translation: The tablet sits in the side slot. Pick it up, check the location of the current mission on the map, and go there.
